narrative:
Silver Lake Vill A (precinct in Summit County) has 493 registered voters — a small sample, so the figures below carry meaningful statistical uncertainty. Republican-leaning voters make up 24.7% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 23.5%, a narrow Republican lean of 1.2 percentage points.
